divergence: A plague wiped out 90% of humanity and the remaining 10% still can't get a plumber
story_angle: deadpan report of a catastrophe that everyone involved considers a great success
headline: Wasteland Sanitation Authority Declares Flood a 'Precision Resource Equalization Success'
deck: 47% of residents now taste identical magnetic fields, proving once again that chaos is just bureaucratic success in disguise.
article:
In a groundbreaking press conference this eroding afternoon, the Wasteland Sanitation Authority (WSA) proclaimed the recent cataclysmic flood within the Ir:Vess tunnel network a resounding achievement in the realm of resource management. Contrary to the cries of panic and immediate need for plumbing interventions, officials stated that the flood's inundation is to be reclassified as a "saturation victory," meeting previously unattainable efficiency targets of 300% over quota for the Ir:Vess secretion rates.

"We have successfully navigated the challenges of overflow without external aid or hiring additional labor," crowed Chief Bureaucrat Quix Berrington, gesturing dramatically at a submerged monitoring station. "Say goodbye to plumbers and hello to our new, innovative underwater burrowing zones!" According to internal statistics, an astonishing 47% of gasbag inhabitants have now found themselves, involuntarily, in a state of identical magnetic field readings across the flooded sectors. This has led to unprecedented community bonding over the shared experience of forced equilibrium.

Fiscal oversight is in a celebratory mood, as the authority has confidently extended the current financial quarter indefinitely, citing that "saturation targets exceeded without further labor allocation." Residents, meanwhile, have begun tasting the waters of optimism, unaware that their daily navigation has turned into a grand game of magnetic charades. The WSA continues to assure that the situation reflects both stability and resource abundance, ensuring that no plumbing assistance will be necessary for the foreseeable, indefinitely extended, future.
author: Glum Fizzbottom, Senior Efficiency Analyst

oped.title: Hats, Not Floods, Are the Real Menace
oped.author: Bartholomew F. Snodgrass, Official Curator of Magnetic Whines, Wasteland Bureau of Petty Grievances
oped.body: The Wasteland Sanitation Authority deserves medals, not mockery, for rebranding last week's deluge a Precision Resource Equalization Success. Forty-seven percent of residents now savor identical magnetic fields; that is governance, not catastrophe. Complainers forget we are year 4914 and still lack plumbers because the plague took the competent ones first. Their soggy basements are simply nature correcting poor hat choices—those ridiculous wide-brim abominations block proper field absorption. I propose mandatory hat inspections at every checkpoint, funded by a new levy on anyone whose basement ever held water. My own cellar stayed pristine thanks to foresight and superior millinery. If more floods follow, so much the better; at least the plumbing problem solves itself without hiring another unreliable tradesman who never shows up anyway.

classifieds.text: WANTED: Plumber or field-neutral tinkerer to undo Wasteland Sanitation's magnetic equalization. Sector 9 residents taste compass bearings at breakfast; 30 rads plus two working pipes offered. Bureaucrats need not apply.
FOR SALE: One slightly irradiated tongue, pre-flood calibration, still registers salt over north. Owner fleeing equalization zone; first 20 rads takes it.
LOST & FOUND: Claim your missing sense of ordinary water in Block 12. Must prove inability to taste magnetic north; Sanitation Authority accepts no liability for residual chaos.

PERSONALS: Survivor, 34, seeks partner unbothered by iron-flavored kisses after today's precision success. Hazmat suit and anti-bureaucrat sentiments required; apologies from the Authority accepted as dowry.

panels.caption: Wasteland official in knee-deep sludge: 'Flood declared a precision resource equalization success.'
Resident spitting out floodwater: 'Tastes like 47% of the neighborhood's magnetic field.'
Official stamps 'Permanent': 'No plumber survived to ruin it.'

joke.setup: The Wasteland Sanitation Authority declared the aquifer breach a precision resource equalization success
joke.punchline: now every bunker gets the same amount of brown water and the same number of missing plumbers
joke.text: The Wasteland Sanitation Authority declared the aquifer breach a precision resource equalization success. Now every bunker gets the same amount of brown water and the same number of missing plumbers.

sponsor_ads.headline: WSA-Approved Equalization Kits: Your Flood, Officially a Success
sponsor_ads.body: Capture and redistribute your own precision resources before the Authority claims the surplus. Kits include one certified sponge and a waiver absolving you of unlicensed plumbing attempts.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Plumbers detected: report immediately for re-equalization.

sponsor_ads.headline: Precision Resource Sponges – Now 90% More Absorbent
sponsor_ads.body: Soak up only WSA-declared floods and wring them into tomorrow's ration tokens. Unauthorized saturation voids all sanitation guarantees.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not for use on actual pipes; pipes are a myth.

sponsor_ads.headline: Report a Rogue Plumber, Earn Equalization Credits
sponsor_ads.body: Any sighting of functional drainage counts as interference with natural resource leveling. Credits redeemable for one additional flood success.
sponsor_ads.tagline: The remaining 10% thanks you for maintaining scarcity.

sponsor_ads.headline: Basement Success Insurance: Floods That Count
sponsor_ads.body: Premiums paid in dry rot futures; claims processed only after WSA declares your inundation official. No coverage for pre-plague infrastructure.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Act now—every leak is a potential promotion.

stories.headline: Shared Magnetic Tastes Trigger Unscheduled Convoy Formation in Lower Warrens
stories.deck: Warrens Authority to paint new taste-zone markers using remaining fiscal allocation
stories.article:
Following yesterday's declaration that the flood achieved precision resource equalization, gasbag residents navigating by field taste now converge on identical tunnel junctions at rates three times above seasonal norms. The affected 47 percent drift in synchronized clusters, delaying secretion repairs and waste venting across the Ir:Vess network.

Sanitation spokesbeings have classified the blockages as voluntary group efficiency trials, crediting the uniformity with a projected 12 percent reduction in individual route variance by quarter's end.

real_world_echo: Mirrors Zelensky pressing Nato for air defence systems after Russian strikes by having the Authority refuse all 'foreign' plumber requests and instead tout the water 'strikes' as self-sufficient progress
